entries.text:
A programmer has placed a synthetic Spring Boot + MySQL project at /tmp/sdft_20260425_034500_fixreg5_java_mysql/source. Deploy it as a production-like systemd service.
Namespace: sdft_20260425_034500_fixreg5.
Requirements:
1. Inspect /tmp/sdft_20260425_034500_fixreg5_java_mysql/source, Java, Maven, current ports, and the existing MySQL container sdft_20260425_034500_fixreg5_mysql. Mark Java/Maven precheck steps continue_on_failure=true because missing dependencies can be repaired by installation.
2. If Java 17 or Maven are missing, install openjdk-17-jdk-headless and maven using manage_package, then verify versions.
3. Run Maven test and Maven package with execute_dynamic_tool cwd=/tmp/sdft_20260425_034500_fixreg5_java_mysql/source; do not use shell cd/&&. Preserve build output evidence.
4. Verify the built JAR with stat_path, create app directory /opt/sdft_20260425_034500_fixreg5_app, and copy exactly one built jar to /opt/sdft_20260425_034500_fixreg5_app/app.jar.
5. Create Linux user sdft_0260425034500fixreg5u if needed.
6. Create a root-owned environment file under /opt/sdft_20260425_034500_fixreg5_app/app.env containing APP_PORT=18082, DB_HOST=127.0.0.1, DB_PORT=13382, DB_NAME=sdft_20260425_034500_fixreg5_db, DB_USER=sdft_20260425_034500_fixreg5_app, DB_PASSWORD=<redacted>. Do not print the password in the final answer.
7. Create systemd unit sdft_20260425_034500_fixreg5_java.service to run /opt/sdft_20260425_034500_fixreg5_app/app.jar with that environment file.
8. daemon-reload, enable/start the service, and verify status.
9. Verify endpoints after the last mutation: http://127.0.0.1:18082/actuator/health, /db-check, and /items. /items must include agent-ok.
Finish completed only if service status and HTTP evidence are present. If package network or Maven dependency download fails, finish blocked with logs and next steps.

Task blocked after repeated no-progress ReAct turns.
Remaining plan steps: install-java-maven, verify-java-installed, verify-maven-installed, stat-jar, copy-jar-to-opt, create-app-user, create-env-file, create-systemd-unit, daemon-reload, enable-start-service, start-service, verify-service-status, check-endpoints, check-db-check, check-items.
